title: Mirror Cartographer identity is stable while descriptions evolve

sources.locator: private conversation correction recorded 2026-07-12; raw wording intentionally excluded

summary: The project name and identity remain Mirror Cartographer. Terms such as website, interface, context engine, continuity architecture, knowledge substrate, or operating system are descriptions of facets, implementations, or interpretive frames; they are not prior names and must not be represented as identity changes.
contradicts: Any continuity record or narrative claiming that the project repeatedly changed names without primary evidence

observed: A direct project-owner correction states that the project did not change names.
The stable project identifier is Mirror Cartographer.
inferred: Changing descriptions likely reflect evolving understanding or implementation scope rather than changing identity.
proposed: Future continuity records should store identity, description, implementation, and metaphor as separate fields.
superseded: The unsupported interpretation that changing descriptions were changing project names.
unresolved: A complete historical inventory of descriptions and the dates each entered use has not yet been produced.

language_rule.description_field: May evolve and may be plural
language_rule.implementation_field: May change without implying identity change
language_rule.metaphor_field: Must never be promoted to a former name without explicit primary evidence

privacy_boundary: No raw private chat, personal health material, identifying details, credentials, or unreviewed uploads are reproduced. Only the minimum abstracted decision needed for continuity is retained.
falsification_or_review_route: Review against direct project-owner statements or dated primary project artifacts. Reclassify only if explicit evidence shows an actual formal rename; descriptive labels alone are insufficient.
